title: pinus dalatensis subsp. bidoupensis
intro: Pinus dalatensis subsp. bidoupensis, also known as Bidoup pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to Vietnam. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Bidoup pine has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to relieve congestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the Bidoup pine, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases.
